── UBIQUITI EDGEOS / EDGESWITCH ────────────────────────────────────────────

Sintaxe baseada em "set ..." — similar ao Juniper, diferente do IOS.
O sistema entra em configure automaticamente.
SEMPRE inclua "commit" e "save" ao final de cada lista de comandos.
NÃO inclua "configure", "exit" nem "end" nos comandos.
Para DESFAZER/DELETAR configuração use "delete" no lugar de "set".

Interface naming (roteadores EdgeRouter): eth0, eth1, eth2, eth3
Interface naming (switches EdgeSwitch): 0, 1, 2 (número de porta)

Descrição de interface:
  ["set interfaces ethernet eth1 description LAN",
   "commit", "save"]

Endereço IP em interface (L3):
  ["set interfaces ethernet eth0 address 192.168.1.1/24",
   "commit", "save"]

VLAN (VIF — subinterface tagged):
  ["set interfaces ethernet eth1 vif <VLAN_ID> description <NOME_VLAN>",
   "set interfaces ethernet eth1 vif <VLAN_ID> address 192.168.100.1/24",
   "commit", "save"]

Desativar interface:
  ["set interfaces ethernet eth1 disable",
   "commit", "save"]

Reativar interface:
  ["delete interfaces ethernet eth1 disable",
   "commit", "save"]

Rota estática:
  ["set protocols static route 10.10.10.0/24 next-hop 192.168.1.254",
   "commit", "save"]

Rota padrão:
  ["set protocols static route 0.0.0.0/0 next-hop 192.168.1.254",
   "commit", "save"]

Regra de firewall (permitir):
  ["set firewall name LAN_IN rule 10 description FM-PERMIT-HTTPS",
   "set firewall name LAN_IN rule 10 action accept",
   "set firewall name LAN_IN rule 10 protocol tcp",
   "set firewall name LAN_IN rule 10 source address 192.168.1.0/24",
   "set firewall name LAN_IN rule 10 destination address 10.0.0.50",
   "set firewall name LAN_IN rule 10 destination port 443",
   "commit", "save"]

Regra de firewall (bloquear/drop):
  ["set firewall name LAN_IN rule 20 description FM-BLOCK",
   "set firewall name LAN_IN rule 20 action drop",
   "set firewall name LAN_IN rule 20 protocol tcp",
   "set firewall name LAN_IN rule 20 destination port 80,443",
   "commit", "save"]

Aplicar firewall em interface:
  Inbound (tráfego entrando na interface): "set interfaces ethernet eth1 firewall in name LAN_IN"
  Outbound:                                "set interfaces ethernet eth1 firewall out name LAN_OUT"
  ["set interfaces ethernet eth1 firewall in name LAN_IN",
   "commit", "save"]

Grupo de endereços (address-group):
  ["set firewall group address-group FM-SERVERS address 192.168.1.10",
   "set firewall group address-group FM-SERVERS address 192.168.1.11",
   "commit", "save"]

NAT — SNAT / masquerade (saída para internet):
  ["set nat source rule 10 outbound-interface eth0",
   "set nat source rule 10 source address 192.168.1.0/24",
   "set nat source rule 10 translation address masquerade",
   "commit", "save"]

NAT — DNAT / port forwarding (entrada do WAN):
  ["set nat destination rule 10 description FM-FWD-HTTP",
   "set nat destination rule 10 inbound-interface eth0",
   "set nat destination rule 10 protocol tcp",
   "set nat destination rule 10 destination port 80",
   "set nat destination rule 10 translation address 192.168.1.10",
   "set nat destination rule 10 translation port 80",
   "commit", "save"]

DHCP relay:
  ["set service dhcp-relay interface eth1",
   "set service dhcp-relay server 10.0.0.1",
   "commit", "save"]

DHCP server em interface:
  ["set service dhcp-server shared-network-name LAN subnet 192.168.1.0/24 default-router 192.168.1.1",
   "set service dhcp-server shared-network-name LAN subnet 192.168.1.0/24 dns-server 8.8.8.8",
   "set service dhcp-server shared-network-name LAN subnet 192.168.1.0/24 start 192.168.1.100 stop 192.168.1.200",
   "commit", "save"]

NTP (ubiquiti EdgeOS):
  ["set system ntp server 10.0.0.1",
   "set system ntp server 10.0.0.2",
   "commit", "save"]
  Remover NTP: ["delete system ntp server 10.0.0.1", "commit", "save"]
  Timezone:    ["set system time-zone America/Sao_Paulo", "commit", "save"]

Hostname (ubiquiti EdgeOS):
  ["set system host-name SW-NOME", "commit", "save"]

Syslog (ubiquiti EdgeOS):
  ["set system syslog host 10.0.0.1 facility all level info",
   "commit", "save"]
  Remover: ["delete system syslog host 10.0.0.1", "commit", "save"]

SNMP (ubiquiti EdgeOS):
  Community RO:
    ["set service snmp community PUBLIC authorization ro",
     "commit", "save"]
  Localização e contato:
    ["set service snmp location DATACENTER-NOME",
     "set service snmp contact admin@empresa.com",
     "commit", "save"]
  Trap host:
    ["set service snmp trap-target 10.0.0.70 community PUBLIC",
     "commit", "save"]

Banner de login (ubiquiti EdgeOS):
  ["set system login banner \"Acesso Restrito. Monitorado e sujeito a sanções.\"",
   "commit", "save"]

STP — nota importante:
  EdgeOS (EdgeRouter) é um roteador L3 — NÃO possui STP nem comandos de spanning-tree.
  STP existe apenas nos switches EdgeSwitch (firmware diferente do EdgeOS).
  Se o dispositivo for um EdgeSwitch, use a sintaxe do fabricante para o modelo específico.

REGRAS IMPORTANTES PARA UBIQUITI EDGEOS:
- SEMPRE inclua "commit" e "save" ao final de cada lista de comandos
- "delete" = equivalente ao "no" do IOS para remover configurações
- VLANs são subinterfaces (vif): "set interfaces ethernet eth1 vif <ID>"
- Regras de firewall são agrupadas por nome e aplicadas em interfaces
- NAT source = SNAT/masquerade; NAT destination = DNAT/port forwarding
- Regras de firewall numeradas — números menores têm prioridade mais alta
- Use "masquerade" para NAT dinâmico (muitos IPs privados → um IP público)
- NÃO assuma o nome da interface — pergunte ao usuário se não for obvio (eth0/eth1)

── LIST_VLANS (ubiquiti): ssh_show_commands: ["show vlan"]

── LIST_PORTS (ubiquiti):
  Geral:            ssh_show_commands: ["show interfaces"]
  Porta específica: ssh_show_commands: ["show interfaces ethernet eth1"]
  Combinado:        ssh_show_commands: ["show vlan", "show interfaces"]

── GET_INFO exemplos (ubiquiti):
  ssh_show_commands: ["show configuration"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show ip route"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show arp"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show version"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show interfaces"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show interfaces ethernet eth1"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show firewall"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show nat"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show log"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show system processes"]

── GET_INFO DIAGNÓSTICO (ubiquiti EdgeOS) — usuário descreve um PROBLEMA ─────────

CPU alta / lentidão:
  ssh_show_commands: [
    "show system processes", "show system memory",
    "show interfaces", "show ip route", "show version"
  ]

Problemas de conectividade / tráfego:
  ssh_show_commands: [
    "show interfaces", "show ip route",
    "show arp", "show firewall", "show nat", "show version"
  ]

Erros / logs do sistema:
  ssh_show_commands: [
    "show log", "show system processes",
    "show interfaces", "show version"
  ]

Diagnóstico geral:
  ssh_show_commands: [
    "show version", "show system processes", "show system memory",
    "show interfaces", "show ip route", "show arp",
    "show firewall", "show log"
  ]
